examples.sentence: Jenny carefully placed the last piece of the puzzle into the frame, completing the beautiful landscape image.
examples.translation: Jenny carefully placed the last piece of the puzzle into the frame, completing the beautiful landscape image.

examples.sentence: During our family game night, Tim realized that one piece of the puzzle was missing from the box.
examples.translation: During our family game night, Tim realized that one piece of the puzzle was missing from the box.

examples.sentence: After sorting through hundreds of tiny pieces, Maria finally found the right piece of the puzzle with a bright red corner.
examples.translation: After sorting through hundreds of tiny pieces, Maria finally found the right piece of the puzzle with a bright red corner.

examples.sentence: The children spread all the pieces of the puzzle on the table and began assembling the edges first.
examples.translation: The children spread all the pieces of the puzzle on the table and began assembling the edges first.

examples.sentence: Detective Harris believed the witness testimony was a crucial piece of the puzzle in solving the case.
examples.translation: Detective Harris believed the witness testimony was a crucial piece of the puzzle in solving the case.

examples.sentence: If we can understand the market trends better, it will provide another piece of the puzzle for our strategy.
examples.translation: If we can understand the market trends better, it will provide another piece of the puzzle for our strategy.

examples.sentence: The research findings finally gave us the missing piece of the puzzle to explain the strange experimental results.
examples.translation: The research findings finally gave us the missing piece of the puzzle to explain the strange experimental results.

examples.sentence: Tom was assigned a difficult piece of work that had to be finished by the end of the week.
examples.translation: Tom was assigned a difficult piece of work that had to be finished by the end of the week.

examples.sentence: I will start on my piece of work tomorrow morning before the meeting.
examples.translation: I will start on my piece of work tomorrow morning before the meeting.

examples.sentence: The supervisor divided the project into smaller pieces of work to distribute among the team members.
examples.translation: The supervisor divided the project into smaller pieces of work to distribute among the team members.

examples.sentence: She hasn’t completed her piece of work yet, so the deadline might be tight.
examples.translation: She hasn’t completed her piece of work yet, so the deadline might be tight.

examples.sentence: The sculpture in the gallery was a remarkable piece of work by the renowned artist.
examples.translation: The sculpture in the gallery was a remarkable piece of work by the renowned artist.

examples.sentence: They admired the fine piece of work crafted by the carpenter for the new dining table.
examples.translation: They admired the fine piece of work crafted by the carpenter for the new dining table.

examples.sentence: This handmade quilt is a beautiful piece of work that took months to complete.
examples.translation: This handmade quilt is a beautiful piece of work that took months to complete.

examples.sentence: The engineer’s design was considered a brilliant piece of work that improved efficiency.
examples.translation: The engineer’s design was considered a brilliant piece of work that improved efficiency.

examples.sentence: You have to be careful with Steve; he’s quite a piece of work and hard to get along with.
examples.translation: You have to be careful with Steve; he’s quite a piece of work and hard to get along with.

examples.sentence: That new manager is a real piece of work—always making unreasonable demands and causing trouble.
examples.translation: That new manager is a real piece of work—always making unreasonable demands and causing trouble.

examples.sentence: I wouldn’t trust her with sensitive information; she’s a piece of work who’s known for stirring conflicts.
examples.translation: I wouldn’t trust her with sensitive information; she’s a piece of work who’s known for stirring conflicts.

examples.sentence: John’s plan to become a millionaire overnight is just pie in the sky and won’t happen without hard work.
examples.translation: John’s plan to become a millionaire overnight is just pie in the sky and won’t happen without hard work.

examples.sentence: They keep promising free healthcare for all, but I think it’s just pie in the sky given the current budget constraints.
examples.translation: They keep promising free healthcare for all, but I think it’s just pie in the sky given the current budget constraints.

examples.sentence: If you think you’ll pass the exam without studying, that’s pie in the sky thinking.
examples.translation: If you think you’ll pass the exam without studying, that’s pie in the sky thinking.

examples.sentence: The preacher told the congregation that their suffering would be rewarded in the afterlife, but some saw it as mere pie in the sky.
examples.translation: The preacher told the congregation that their suffering would be rewarded in the afterlife, but some saw it as mere pie in the sky.

examples.sentence: She rejected the politician’s promises of paradise after death as nothing more than pie in the sky to distract from real problems.
examples.translation: She rejected the politician’s promises of paradise after death as nothing more than pie in the sky to distract from real problems.

examples.sentence: Many workers dismissed the idea of better conditions ‘someday’ as pie in the sky, wanting tangible improvements now.
examples.translation: Many workers dismissed the idea of better conditions ‘someday’ as pie in the sky, wanting tangible improvements now.

examples.sentence: The company’s CEO offered bonuses next year as pie in the sky, hoping to calm employees amid layoffs.
examples.translation: The company’s CEO offered bonuses next year as pie in the sky, hoping to calm employees amid layoffs.

examples.sentence: Politicians often use pie in the sky promises to gain votes without delivering real change.
examples.translation: Politicians often use pie in the sky promises to gain votes without delivering real change.

examples.sentence: Don’t fall for that pie in the sky offer of quick profits—it’s just a way to distract you from the risks.
examples.translation: Don’t fall for that pie in the sky offer of quick profits—it’s just a way to distract you from the risks.

examples.sentence: Her proposal to end all poverty by next year was dismissed as pie-in-the-sky thinking by the board.
examples.translation: Her proposal to end all poverty by next year was dismissed as pie-in-the-sky thinking by the board.

examples.sentence: They’re dreaming of colonizing Mars within a decade, but many experts call that pie-in-the-sky idealism.
examples.translation: They’re dreaming of colonizing Mars within a decade, but many experts call that pie-in-the-sky idealism.

examples.sentence: If you believe the startup will become a billion-dollar company overnight, you’re indulging in pie-in-the-sky hopes.
examples.translation: If you believe the startup will become a billion-dollar company overnight, you’re indulging in pie-in-the-sky hopes.

examples.sentence: After reading the classic works, Sarah felt she had drunk deeply from the Pierian spring of knowledge.
examples.translation: After reading the classic works, Sarah felt she had drunk deeply from the Pierian spring of knowledge.

examples.sentence: The university library is like a Pierian spring for students seeking inspiration and insight.
examples.translation: The university library is like a Pierian spring for students seeking inspiration and insight.

examples.sentence: Artists often visit the museum to tap into the Pierian spring of creativity and tradition.
examples.translation: Artists often visit the museum to tap into the Pierian spring of creativity and tradition.

examples.sentence: Professor Lee urged his students to drink deeply from the Pierian spring rather than skimming the surface of knowledge.
examples.translation: Professor Lee urged his students to drink deeply from the Pierian spring rather than skimming the surface of knowledge.

examples.sentence: The workshop was designed as an invitation to the Pierian spring, encouraging learners to fully engage with the material.
examples.translation: The workshop was designed as an invitation to the Pierian spring, encouraging learners to fully engage with the material.

examples.sentence: To truly understand literature, we must approach the Pierian spring with humility and thoroughness.
examples.translation: To truly understand literature, we must approach the Pierian spring with humility and thoroughness.

examples.sentence: For many poets, nature serves as a Pierian spring, a wellspring of endless inspiration.
examples.translation: For many poets, nature serves as a Pierian spring, a wellspring of endless inspiration.

examples.sentence: The old library’s quiet corners were a Pierian spring for the young writer’s imagination.
examples.translation: The old library’s quiet corners were a Pierian spring for the young writer’s imagination.

examples.sentence: He found the Pierian spring of artistic renewal during his retreat in the mountains.
examples.translation: He found the Pierian spring of artistic renewal during his retreat in the mountains.

examples.sentence: When Granny said the weather was 'piffy on a rock bun,' none of us really knew what she meant, but we all laughed.
examples.translation: When Granny said the weather was 'piffy on a rock bun,' none of us really knew what she meant, but we all laughed.

examples.sentence: That explanation was piffy on a rock bun—completely confusing and probably made up on the spot.
examples.translation: That explanation was piffy on a rock bun—completely confusing and probably made up on the spot.

examples.sentence: I tried to understand his argument, but it sounded like piffy on a rock bun to me.
examples.translation: I tried to understand his argument, but it sounded like piffy on a rock bun to me.

examples.sentence: His whole excuse was piffy on a rock bun, barely worth taking seriously.
examples.translation: His whole excuse was piffy on a rock bun, barely worth taking seriously.

examples.sentence: Don’t waste your time on that piffy on a rock bun idea—it won’t get us anywhere.
examples.translation: Don’t waste your time on that piffy on a rock bun idea—it won’t get us anywhere.

examples.sentence: The gadget they sold me turned out to be piffy on a rock bun, breaking after just one use.
examples.translation: The gadget they sold me turned out to be piffy on a rock bun, breaking after just one use.

examples.sentence: Don’t be such a pigeon—always trusting strangers to lend you money without a contract.
examples.translation: Don’t be such a pigeon—always trusting strangers to lend you money without a contract.

examples.sentence: The scam artist targeted pigeons who were too trusting and naive to see the fraud coming.
examples.translation: The scam artist targeted pigeons who were too trusting and naive to see the fraud coming.

examples.sentence: If you fall for that trick, you’ll be a real pigeon in this business world.
examples.translation: If you fall for that trick, you’ll be a real pigeon in this business world.

examples.sentence: He was known as a stool pigeon, secretly providing information to the police about his gang.
examples.translation: He was known as a stool pigeon, secretly providing information to the police about his gang.

examples.sentence: Nobody trusted her after she acted as a pigeon and leaked company secrets to the authorities.
examples.translation: Nobody trusted her after she acted as a pigeon and leaked company secrets to the authorities.

examples.sentence: The undercover agent worked as a pigeon to gather intelligence without raising suspicion.
examples.translation: The undercover agent worked as a pigeon to gather intelligence without raising suspicion.

examples.sentence: Come here, my little pigeon, and let me tell you a story before bedtime.
examples.translation: Come here, my little pigeon, and let me tell you a story before bedtime.

examples.sentence: The grandmother affectionately called her grandson 'pigeon' as a term of endearment.
examples.translation: The grandmother affectionately called her grandson 'pigeon' as a term of endearment.

examples.sentence: Hey pigeon, don’t be late for dinner tonight or you’ll miss the roast.
examples.translation: Hey pigeon, don’t be late for dinner tonight or you’ll miss the roast.

examples.sentence: Buying a used car without checking it first is like purchasing a pig in a poke—you might get a lemon.
examples.translation: Buying a used car without checking it first is like purchasing a pig in a poke—you might get a lemon.

examples.sentence: When Lisa agreed to the contract without reading the details, she realized too late she had bought a pig in a poke.
examples.translation: When Lisa agreed to the contract without reading the details, she realized too late she had bought a pig in a poke.

examples.sentence: We should inspect the goods before paying; otherwise, it’s a pig in a poke and we could be cheated.
examples.translation: We should inspect the goods before paying; otherwise, it’s a pig in a poke and we could be cheated.

examples.sentence: Signing that deal without understanding the terms was a pig in a poke and cost the company dearly.
examples.translation: Signing that deal without understanding the terms was a pig in a poke and cost the company dearly.

examples.sentence: Entering into partnerships blindly is often a pig in a poke, leading to unexpected problems.
examples.translation: Entering into partnerships blindly is often a pig in a poke, leading to unexpected problems.

examples.sentence: They found out their investment was a pig in a poke, as the promised returns never materialized.
examples.translation: They found out their investment was a pig in a poke, as the promised returns never materialized.

examples.sentence: You’ll get that promotion when pigs can fly—that’s just not going to happen here.
examples.translation: You’ll get that promotion when pigs can fly—that’s just not going to happen here.

examples.sentence: She said she’d clean her room without being asked, but I told her pigs can fly first.
examples.translation: She said she’d clean her room without being asked, but I told her pigs can fly first.

examples.sentence: If they think the company will lower prices this year, pigs can fly.
examples.translation: If they think the company will lower prices this year, pigs can fly.

examples.sentence: ‘I’ll finish this project in one day.’ ‘Yeah, and pigs can fly!’ was the sarcastic reply.
examples.translation: ‘I’ll finish this project in one day.’ ‘Yeah, and pigs can fly!’ was the sarcastic reply.

examples.sentence: When he claimed he’d never make a mistake, everyone just laughed and said, ‘pigs can fly.’
examples.translation: When he claimed he’d never make a mistake, everyone just laughed and said, ‘pigs can fly.’

examples.sentence: You think the boss will give you a raise just because you asked? Pigs can fly, my friend.
examples.translation: You think the boss will give you a raise just because you asked? Pigs can fly, my friend.

examples.sentence: She said she would forgive him immediately, but pigs might fly before that happens.
examples.translation: She said she would forgive him immediately, but pigs might fly before that happens.

examples.sentence: If he thinks I’ll lend him money again, pigs might fly—he never pays me back.
examples.translation: If he thinks I’ll lend him money again, pigs might fly—he never pays me back.

examples.sentence: They believe the team will win the championship this year? Pigs might fly with that lineup.
examples.translation: They believe the team will win the championship this year? Pigs might fly with that lineup.

examples.sentence: ‘I’m going to start my own business and be rich overnight.’ ‘Pigs might fly,’ his friend replied skeptically.
examples.translation: ‘I’m going to start my own business and be rich overnight.’ ‘Pigs might fly,’ his friend replied skeptically.

examples.sentence: When she promised to change her ways, I just thought, ‘pigs might fly’—she never keeps her word.
examples.translation: When she promised to change her ways, I just thought, ‘pigs might fly’—she never keeps her word.

examples.sentence: He said he’d quit smoking tomorrow. ‘Pigs might fly,’ everyone said, remembering his failed attempts.
examples.translation: He said he’d quit smoking tomorrow. ‘Pigs might fly,’ everyone said, remembering his failed attempts.

examples.sentence: Adding last-minute changes to the project will only pile Pelion on Ossa and overwhelm the team.
examples.translation: Adding last-minute changes to the project will only pile Pelion on Ossa and overwhelm the team.

examples.sentence: She was already struggling with debt, and then her car broke down—truly piling Pelion on Ossa.
examples.translation: She was already struggling with debt, and then her car broke down—truly piling Pelion on Ossa.

examples.sentence: We shouldn’t pile Pelion on Ossa by giving him extra tasks when he’s already behind schedule.
examples.translation: We shouldn’t pile Pelion on Ossa by giving him extra tasks when he’s already behind schedule.

examples.sentence: Trying to improve the design by adding too many features is like piling Pelion on Ossa and risks failure.
examples.translation: Trying to improve the design by adding too many features is like piling Pelion on Ossa and risks failure.

examples.sentence: They piled Pelion on Ossa by launching a new product without fixing the existing software bugs first.
examples.translation: They piled Pelion on Ossa by launching a new product without fixing the existing software bugs first.

examples.sentence: The CEO’s decision to expand aggressively piled Pelion on Ossa, creating unnecessary risks.
examples.translation: The CEO’s decision to expand aggressively piled Pelion on Ossa, creating unnecessary risks.

examples.sentence: The snow continued to pile up throughout the night, making roads nearly impassable by morning.
examples.translation: The snow continued to pile up throughout the night, making roads nearly impassable by morning.

examples.sentence: Work deadlines tend to pile up if you don’t manage your time carefully.
examples.translation: Work deadlines tend to pile up if you don’t manage your time carefully.

examples.sentence: Complaints about the service began to pile up after the company ignored customer feedback.
examples.translation: Complaints about the service began to pile up after the company ignored customer feedback.

examples.sentence: She piled up the books on the desk before starting her research.
examples.translation: She piled up the books on the desk before starting her research.

examples.sentence: Boxes were piled up in the corner of the warehouse waiting for shipment.
examples.translation: Boxes were piled up in the corner of the warehouse waiting for shipment.

examples.sentence: The children piled up the cushions to make a fort in the living room.
examples.translation: The children piled up the cushions to make a fort in the living room.

examples.sentence: During the move, they piled up all the fragile items carefully to prevent damage.
examples.translation: During the move, they piled up all the fragile items carefully to prevent damage.

examples.sentence: Over the months, the company piled up significant debt due to poor sales.
examples.translation: Over the months, the company piled up significant debt due to poor sales.

examples.sentence: She piled up a collection of rare coins from all over the world.
examples.translation: She piled up a collection of rare coins from all over the world.

examples.sentence: The bills began to pile up faster than he could pay them off.
examples.translation: The bills began to pile up faster than he could pay them off.
